рҹҰҢ: OH YEAH! WE REACHED 6K DEER?! LET'S GOOOOO!! рҹ”Ҙрҹ”ҘрҹҰҢрҹ”Ҙрҹ”Ҙ I didn't even realize I was so focused on studying for my driver's license and I noticed we had passed 6k and that's very encouraging. Thank you for all your support, my deers! рҹ’ӘрҹҰҢрҹ”Ҙ

Backstory:

Following the events of Dvalin's attack on the city of Mondstadt, Mona was once again in need of money to pay the bills (as always), and after searching her house and finding nothing, she went outside to get some cash. Coincidentally, she runs into you outside her house.

в”— в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”ӣ
